original_statement: "Switzerland are favourites to progress from Group B [Canada, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Qatar, Switzerland] at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with an 85.4% chance of advancing to the knockout stage according to the Opta supercomputer [as of 3 June 2026]."
statement_topic: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group stage qualification
statement_context: Excerpt from data-driven group stage preview published by The Analyst on 2026-06-03. Author is Dan Edwards using Opta supercomputer methodology.
resolution_criteria: Switzerland qualifies for the knockout stage from Group B in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by finishing in the top two or as one of the best third-placed teams according to the official FIFA group stage standings published after all group matches conclude on or before 2026-06-26.
source_text_snippet: Switzerland are favourites to progress, with an 85.4% chance, topping the group in 42.1% of simulations. ... Switzerland have a strong chance of topping their group at the World Cup for only the second time... They have a 42.1% chance of winning the group and an 85.4% likelihood of reaching the knockouts via any route.
